message:
feat(mux): integrate mux into single termweb binary

- Remove separate termweb-mux binary
- Run mux directly via "termweb mux" subcommand
- Skip stb_image.c compilation (libghostty already has it)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+lockfileVersion: '9.0'
+
+settings:
+  autoInstallPeers: true
+  excludeLinksFromLockfile: false
+
+pnpmfileChecksum: sha256-47DEQpj8HBSa+/TImW+5JCeuQeRkm5NMpJWZG3hSuFU=
+
+importers:
+
+  .: {}
+
+  packages/code:
+    dependencies:
+      termweb:
+        specifier: workspace:*
+        version: link:../..
+
+  packages/json:
+    dependencies:
+      termweb:
+        specifier: workspace:*
+        version: link:../..
+
+  packages/markdown:
+    dependencies:
+      termweb:
+        specifier: workspace:*
+        version: link:../..
